title: Snowball Arsenal
description: A mod that adds various snowball types to your game.
body:
First off, why would I want this mod?
--------------------------------------
This mod offers 5 new ranged items to aid you in combat against monsters! Great for people who want snowballs to be deadl- I mean great for people who want more ranged weapons.

Features
----------------
- Spikeball, A snowball but it does damage.

- Snowbomb, a snowball that explodes.

- Slushball, a snowball which spawns water once it falls on the ground. Only works when thrown on the ground, not mobs.

- Iceball, a Spikeball, but it does more damage.

- Spiked Iceball, an iceball that is very brutal and can two-shot a husk.
